examples: His big fat belly overhung his belt.
She laid her hands on her swollen belly.
The middle button of his uniform jacket was strained over his belly.
There are also a handful of small plates like the stand-out braised pork belly with cider.
Wearing ankle bracelets, handcuffs, and a belly chain, Dellelo was marched into a thirteen-by-eight-foot off-white cell.
